name: Ugly Tuco AI — Premium Design Sprint

tasks.task: Replace all emojis with Phosphor Icons CDN + custom inline SVG icons (hat, revolver, spur, cactus, skull, star, rope)
Create custom SVG icon sprite for Western elements: wanted-star, bullet, horseshoe, tumbleweed, campfire
Build premium SVG brand logo: Tuco silhouette with hat + 'UGLY TUCO AI' wordmark in Western typography
Replace nav brand emoji with SVG hat icon, add subtle hat-tip animation on hover
Replace all section/step emojis (🔫💰🏜️) with custom SVG icons styled in gold/desert theme
Replace skill card emojis (📊🔍🚀🧠📝🔄) with premium Phosphor icons
Add custom SVG 'WANTED' stamp/badge component with distressed texture
Create animated SVG tumbleweed that rolls across hero section
Add SVG cactus silhouettes as decorative elements in section backgrounds
Create animated SVG bullet-hole effect on card hover (subtle crack/impact)
Build 3D page-turning journal: CSS perspective, page flip animation, shadow depth
Add journal cover design: leather-textured CSS background, gold foil stamp '100 DAYS'
Journal page curl effect on hover with realistic shadow gradient
Add journal spine and page-stack visual (multiple page edges visible from side)
Journal entry staggered fade-in with page-turn transition between entries
Add 'handwritten' CSS font effect for journal dates (rough, ink-style)
Journal progress indicator: leather bookmark ribbon that moves down as days progress
Add ink splatter/coffee stain decorative elements on journal pages
Journal page texture: subtle paper grain SVG overlay on entry backgrounds
Build journal navigation: prev/next arrows styled as Western playing-card symbols
Hero section: desert parallax background with layered sand dunes (CSS layers)
Hero: animated sunset gradient sky that shifts colors on scroll
Hero: add heat-wave distortion effect (CSS filter + SVG turbulence)
Hero: gold particles floating upward like desert dust catching sunlight
Hero terminal window: typing animation effect with blinking cursor
Hero: bullet-riddled WANTED sign animation (holes appear one by one)
Navigation: glass-morph saloon bar with backdrop-blur + subtle wood grain texture
Navigation: swinging saloon-door divider animation on menu toggle
Navigation: active section indicator like a bullet-hole marker
Mobile: slide-out wanted-poster menu with torn-paper edge
Cards: premium hover — gold border glint animation, subtle scale, depth shadow
Cards: alternate card styles — 'wanted poster', 'playing card', 'leather notebook' variants
Cards: reveal animation — fade up + gold dust sparkle on scroll-into-view
Add rope/chain decorative dividers between sections (SVG rope pattern)
Custom scrollbar: Western-themed (gold thumb, dark track, rope texture)
Cursor: custom Western crosshair cursor (iron sights style) on interactive elements
Add wanted-poster tacks/pins in corners of bordered elements (animated push-in)
Footer: add Tuco silhouette walking into sunset animation
Loading screen: tumbleweed rolling across desert with 'Loading...' in wanted-poster text
404 page: 'WANTED: This Page' dead-or-alive poster with Tuco joke
Typography system: add Western display font for headings (matching wanted-poster aesthetic)
Add gold-foil text effect CSS for key headings (gradient + shimmer animation)
Drop-cap Western style on manifesto paragraph (large ornate first letter)
Add distressed/weathered text effect for 'UGLY' wordmark (CSS text-shadow layers)
Numbers/monospace: add Western saloon-number style for dates and stats
Audio Easter egg: optional ambient desert sounds toggle (wind, distant coyote)
Konami code upgrade: typing 'tuco' triggers wanted-poster fly-in with random bounty quote
Hidden 'whiskey bottle' clickable element that toasts 'To Blondie!' in gold sparkles
Day/night desert mode toggle (dusk mode with darker sky, stars, campfire glow)
Final polish pass: consistent spacing, responsive fixes, 4K retina assets, print stylesheet
